```{r Create header as definition list}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

cat(sep = "\n", c(
  paste0(sR$headerList$createdAt,":"),
  "",
  paste0(":   ",dR$creationTimestamp),
  "",
  paste0(sR$headerList$dataUpTo,":"),
  "",
  paste0(":   ",dR$dataUpToTimestamp),
  "",
  paste0(sR$headerList$effectiveAnalysisPeriod,":"),
  "",
  paste0(":   ",dR$effectiveAnalysisPeriod, "^[", sR$headerList$effectiveAnalysisPeriodFootnote, "]"),
  "",
  paste0(if(length(reference_data$metadata$countries) > 1)sR$headerList$countries else sR$headerList$country, ":"),
  "",
  paste0(":   ",dR$countriesList),
  "",
  paste0(sR$headerList$birthweightFilter,":"),
  "",
  paste0(":   ",dR$birthweightFilter),
  "",
  paste0(sR$headerList$gestationalAgeFilter,":"),
  "",
  paste0(":   ",dR$gestationalAgeFilter)
))
```

```{r Show dataset composition callout}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

# Determine base message based on country count
if(length(reference_data$metadata$countries) > 1){
  base_message <- sR$headerList$multiCountryDatasetHint
} else {
  base_message <- sR$headerList$singleCountryDatasetHint
}

# Add World Bank class mixing addendum if applicable
if (!is.null(mixed_wb_classes) && mixed_wb_classes$has_mixed) {
  full_message <- paste0(
    base_message,
    " ",
    sprintf(
      sR$headerList$mixedWbClassAddendum,
      mixed_wb_classes$class_names
    )
  )
} else {
  full_message <- base_message
}

cat(sep = "\n", c(
  "::: {.callout-tip}",
  paste0("## ", sR$headerList$datasetCompositionHeader),
  "",
  full_message,
  ":::"
))
```

```{r Custom report hint}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

if(
  reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$include_test_data ||
  reference_data$metadata$dataset_options$include_ineligible_patients) {
  cat(sep = "\n", c("::: {.callout-note}", paste0(
    c(
    sR$headerList$specialAnalysisHint,
    if(!testUnitFilter){
      paste0(sR$headerList$includesTestDepartments,
      if(!defaultPatientFilter)
        sR$headerList$and
      else
        ".", collapse = "")
    },
    if (!defaultPatientFilter)
      sR$headerList$ignoresInclusionCriteria
    ), collapse = " "),
    ":::"))
}
```
